Constantine (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $75,976,178Details
International Box Office $145,617,376
Worldwide Box Office $221,593,554
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$29,769,098 (39.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.55 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,006 opening theaters/3,006 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $134,054,682

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 18th, 2005 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: February 25th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
July 30th, 2025 (Limited), released as Constantine (콘스탄틴) (South Korea)
October 17th, 2025 (Limited) (20th Anniversary, 4K Restoration) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: July 19th, 2005 by Warner Home Video
July 11th, 2005 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for violence and demonic images.
Running Time: 121 minutes
Franchise: John Constantine
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Plot point: Demons, Exorcism, Good vs. Evil, Heaven and Hell
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Weed Road Pictures, Village Roadshow Productions
Production Countries: United States, Germany
Languages: English
